Product - Class in myatt.Model
This class describes a product in the inventory.
Product(int, String, double, int, int, int) - Constructor for class myatt.Model.Product
This constructor creates a new Product with the given id, name, price, stock, min, and max.
productAddButton(ActionEvent) - Method in class myatt.Controller.AddProductController
This method adds a selected part from the part table to the associated parts table.

This method cancels the operation, and takes you back to the main screen view.
